id.description: Unique identifier for the inbox item

parentId.description: Identifier of the parent item if applicable

profile.description: The social network profile associated with the item

agorapulseLink.description: Link to the inbox item in Agorapulse application

networkLink.description: Link to the inbox item in the social network

text.description: Text content of the inbox item

creationDate.description: Creation date of the inbox item

creator.description: The user who created the inbox item

addedLabels.description: Labels added to the item during this event
